name: AMERICAN VANGUARD CORP
summary: American Vanguard Corporation (AVD) is a Delaware holding company operating through subsidiaries including AMVAC Chemical Corporation. The company manufactures and markets chemical, biological, and biorational products for agricultural, commercial, and consumer uses. Products include insecticides, fungicides, herbicides, soil fumigants, molluscicides, growth regulators, plant nutrition, and biorationals, sold in liquid, powder, and granular forms. AVD also offers closed delivery systems such as SmartBox Plus, Lock n Load, and EZ Load, distributing domestically and internationally.
